# Source Manifest

Generated: 2026-06-27

This manifest preserves the source layer used by the Netlify guide. Source entries are practical routing leads, not endorsements, guarantees, or proof of acceptance.

## Directory Shortcuts

- [Raton Chamber Business Directory](https://www.raton.info/business-directory.html) - Colfax; Business directory; Finding Raton-area businesses, sponsors, chamber contacts, and local service anchors.
- [City of Raton Local Business Support](https://www.ratonnm.gov/business/economic_development/local_business_resources.php) - Colfax; Business support; Hands-on startup help, SBA, SBDC, GrowRaton, Raton MainStreet, SCORE, and city support paths.

## 2026-07-01 Directory Sweep Supplement

- `data/yellowpages_outreach_leads_20260701.csv` - deduped scored YellowPages outreach/source-check leads. All rows require manual verification before public reliance.
- `data/yellowpages_outreach_leads_20260701.xlsx` - workbook version of the deduped scored lead list.
- `data/directory_sweep_matrix_20260701.csv` - queued directory sweep matrix for future source checks.
- `data/directory_sweep_queue_20260701.csv` - prioritized queue of directory sources and municipalities.
- `data/source-notes/agentic_ai_amplifier_channels_implementation_brief_20260701.txt` - extracted implementation brief reinforcing no-inference publication rules.



## 2026-07-01 Regional Audio Assets Package

- `data/regional_audio_manifest.json` - Library of Congress Juan B. Rael Collection audio candidates and credit metadata.
- `assets/audio/` - user-initiated archival audio files only; no autoplay.
- Contemporary local music, images, and artwork require permission from the artist or rights holder before use.


## 2026-07-01 LocalStash / Weekender Check

- Added LocalStash town pages, LocalStash business/chamber FAQ routes, LocalStash Magazine: SoCO & NoNM, Weekender Magazines, and Weekender sample issue/rate-sheet pages as visitor-facing directory and amplifier channels.
- Public copy treats these as contact/check routes only. Verify current publication status, eligibility, rates, deadlines, and participation terms before promising placement or asking a business to commit.
